reasoning: I have not changed my mind in eight years. TMC is corrupt—Sandeshkhali, the SSC scam, Mamatabala and Shantanu using the Matua people like commodities. BJP is no different, they just do not have as much to steal yet. Shantanu promises CAA and canal water that never comes. Both parties are machines for taking what they want. Congress cannot do that here because they have no power, and that is exactly why they deserve my vote. My family is native, my documents are clean—I do not care about CAA theatre. I want water in my canal and a fair price for my vegetables. Only Congress, weak as it is, might let me keep what I earn.
primary_drivers: Systematic rejection of TMC (Sandeshkhali, SSC scam, strongman governance since 2016)
BJP viewed as equivalent power machine using same Shantanu and vote-catching tactics
Congress as only 'weak but honest' option that cannot exploit at scale
